{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320120155F137940B545D492BE3C0"}"},"total":6209},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7127648611344892709","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书很好，我边看小说，边看评论，你写什么是什么，不要在意那些读者的话，有些读者我看他就是想看种马文，就算后宫也有感情线的，什么说收就收要么就别收这种话。这种人我真的很烦（希望作者能看到按照自己的意愿写下去）[笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1659535080,"group_id":"7096076561144613899","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzE71GFT/lWoXSTCTVW4hfI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"575769527718515","user_name":"用户57576952"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"575769527718515","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7096076561144613899","book_info":{"abstract":"【一门三帝✚帝落重瞳✚单女主✚至尊骨】
江尘穿越至玄幻世界，觉醒机缘暴击系统。只需将机缘赠予他人，便可触发暴击奖励。
“你赠送一株百年灵药，触发百倍暴击，获得一株千年灵药。”
“你赠送大残至尊骨，触发百万倍暴击，获得奖励神魔至尊骨。”
……
后续江尘却发现，大哥江宇竟吞噬大帝残魂，三弟江道心拥有饕餮神体。
在江尘不断投资下，一门三帝，举世无敌。
别名《一门三帝，我、开局赠送大残至尊骨》
